questions.question:
Micro program is:



CO & Architecture: ISRO CSE 2018 | Question: 34
options: the name of a source program in micro computers
set of microinstructions that defines the individual operations in response to a machine-language instruction
a primitive form of macros used in assembly language programming
a very small segment of machine code
questions.correct_answer: set of microinstructions that defines the individual operations in response to a machine-language instruction
